question: Comment generer un systeme de couleurs coherent pour un design system ?

principles.text: 3-tier CSS custom property tokens (primitive → semantic → component), generate with HCT (@material/material-color-utilities) or OKLCH. Les primitives definissent la palette brute, les semantiques mappent l'intention (--color-primary, --color-surface), les component tokens specialisent par composant.

sources.name: Material Design 3 Color System
sources.quote: Dynamic color is algorithmic, using a single source color to derive five key colors

sources.name: M3 Color Roles
sources.quote: Color roles map to components automatically

sources.name: EightShapes Color in Design Systems
sources.quote: Three-tier token architecture: global, alias, component

sources.name: State of CSS 2024
sources.quote: OKLCH adoption growing for perceptual uniformity
